title: Mobile app connection status change reflected on the Cloud
scenario: Cloud device status shows green connected mark when logged into mobile app and red disconnected mark when logged out
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
Log in to the app with valid credentials.
Navigate to the Home screen and confirm the connection status indicator shows a green mark (connected).
On the Cloud portal, navigate to the Device Users page and verify the device status shows a green mark (connected).
On the Cloud portal, navigate to the Inventory page and verify the device status shows a green mark (connected).
On the Cloud portal, navigate to the Device profile page and verify the device status shows a green mark (connected).
Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app and log out from the Account screen.
On the Cloud portal, navigate to the Device Users page and verify the device status shows a red mark (disconnected).
On the Cloud portal, navigate to the Inventory page and verify the device status shows a red mark (disconnected).
On the Cloud portal, navigate to the Device profile page and verify the device status shows a red mark (disconnected).
expected: When logged in, the connection status shows a green mark (connected) on the Cloud portal's Device Users page, Inventory page, and Device profile page. When logged out, the connection status shows a red mark (disconnected) on all three Cloud portal pages.
